overview: Aries enters the Sri Parabhava year with Adayam 11 and Vyayam 05. The strongest supportive currents come through Guru and Rahu. Pressure points are tied to Shani and Ketu and need measured handling.
yearlyTheme: For those born under Mesha Rashi, the Sree Parabhava Naama Samvatsara (March 19, 2026 – April 6, 2027) promises highly auspicious results throughout the year due to the favorable transit of Guru Graha (Jupiter), with particularly significant beneficial) outcomes manifesting after May 31, 2026. Employees can expect promotions, while unemployed individuals with a strong Jupiter in their personal birth chart are likely to secure prestigious government employment. The period of October, November, and December is particularly conducive for progeny efforts, and students will find this year exceptionally favorable for achieving top results in various entrance examinations. Overall, Guru Graha bestows substantial gains, where those with a well-placed Jupiter in their personal horoscopes will experience a form of Raja Yogam, characterized by increased religious faith, enhanced self-control, elevated social status, and the successful acquisition of knowledge in new domains.
opportunities: For those born under Mesha Rashi, the Sree Parabhava Naama Samvatsara (March 19, 2026 – April 6, 2027) promises highly auspicious results throughout the year due to the favorable transit of Guru Graha (Jupiter), with particularly significant beneficial) outcomes manifesting after May 31, 2026. Employees can expect promotions, while unemployed individuals with a strong Jupiter in their personal birth chart are likely to secure prestigious government employment.
caution: For those born under Mesha Rashi, the Sree Parabhava Naama Samvatsara brings unfavorable results throughout the year due to the influence of Shani. Individuals whose personal birth charts show Shani in adverse positions, or those currently undergoing Shani Maha Dasha, face a high probability of encountering legal difficulties.

planetaryInfluences.summary: For those born under Mesha Rashi, the Sree Parabhava Naama Samvatsara (March 19, 2026 – April 6, 2027) promises highly auspicious results throughout the year due to the favorable transit of Guru Graha (Jupiter), with particularly significant beneficial) outcomes manifesting after May 31, 2026. Employees can expect promotions, while unemployed individuals with a strong Jupiter in their personal birth chart are likely to secure prestigious government employment. The period of October, November, and December is particularly conducive for progeny efforts, and students will find this year exceptionally favorable for achieving top results in various entrance examinations. Overall, Guru Graha bestows substantial gains, where those with a well-placed Jupiter in their personal horoscopes will experience a form of Raja Yogam, characterized by increased religious faith, enhanced self-control, elevated social status, and the successful acquisition of knowledge in new domains.

For those born under Mesha Rashi, the Sree Parabhava Naama Samvatsara brings unfavorable results throughout the year due to the influence of Shani. The impact of the first phase (Pradhama Pada) of Elinati Shani (Sade Sati) will be intense. Individuals whose personal birth charts show Shani in adverse positions, or those currently undergoing Shani Maha Dasha, face a high probability of encountering legal difficulties. The professional sphere may witness sudden losses, a decrease in income, and excessive expenditures. If the difficulties caused by Shani become overwhelming this year, it is advisable to frequently perform Tailabhishekam and participate in Shani Graha Mandaparadhana Shanti Homam for planetary appeasement. Additionally, chanting the prescribed mantra daily is highly recommended for protection and peace. For Aries, Elinati Shani phase will be completed in September 2032.
planetaryInfluences.remedyNote: If the difficulties caused by Shani become overwhelming this year, it is advisable to frequently perform Tailabhishekam and participate in Shani Graha Mandaparadhana Shanti Homam for planetary appeasement.

planetaryInfluences.summary: For those born under Mesha Rashi, the Sree Parabhava Naama Samvatsara brings favorable results due to the influence of Rahu. You will have the opportunity to participate in numerous sacred activities and finally complete pilgrimage trips that have been delayed for a long time. The period from December 2026 to March 2027 will be particularly profitable due to the transit of Rahu Graha. Additionally, you will successfully resolve and emerge from long-standing issues related to ancestral property or inheritance.

For those born under Mesha Rashi, the Sree Parabhava Naama Samvatsara brings unfavorable results due to the influence of Ketu. You may experience distress specifically concerning children who are of marriageable or young adult age. Additionally, obstacles and complications are likely to arise in matters related to the purchase or sale of agricultural land. The health of maternal relatives may also become a cause for concern during this period. Overall, for Mesha Rashi during the Sree Parabhava Naama Samvatsara, Guru Graha and Rahu provide favorable outcomes, while the influences of Shani and Ketu result in adverse conditions.

monthlyHighlights.summary: March 2026 promises mixed results. The first half will be highly favorable, with a positive atmosphere prevailing. Domestic irritations will subside, and tasks will be completed as expected without any delays. Conflicts with siblings (Bhathru varga) will be resolved, and you will achieve your anticipated financial gains. Travels will be comfortable, and you may enjoy gatherings with relatives or friends at home. Those aspiring for foreign residency will find this period auspicious. However, during the second half of the month, increased financial demands may lead to mental anxiety. Additionally, health issues for the elderly members of the family may persist.

In April 2026, you will be able to achieve your anticipated financial gains. Business affairs and transactions will proceed as expected, and the funds required for family needs will be successfully arranged. However, during the second week, there are indications of family-related issues arising with relatives. You may find yourself in a position where you must welcome new decisions made by family members. In your marital life, slight misunderstandings may occur. Additionally, the rebellious attitude of grown-up children might cause some distress. For those in the political field, the attainment of new positions or portfolios is indicated. You must exercise extreme caution while driving on the 21st, 22nd, and 23rd of this month, as there is a possibility of accidents. By the end of the month, you will be successful in recovering long-standing dues. For the unemployed, efforts toward securing a job will bear fruit. During this period, individuals born under Mesha Rashi will develop a strong inclination toward leadership roles. Women will exhibit independent thinking and develop a keen interest in learning new subjects.

During May 2026, those in the business sector may experience mental distress due to the emergence of a specific dispute. It is advisable to move away from the rigid expectation that all tasks must be completed exactly according to your personal desires. While financial income will remain moderate, efforts to secure loans for the construction of a new house will be successful. Your health will be supportive, even when dealing with physically or mentally demanding tasks. In your professional environment, you will be able to influence others effectively through your words. The third week of this month proves to be particularly profitable. Success is indicated in all business transactions and ventures initiated during this period. For those with an optimistic outlook, new avenues of income will manifest. Employees seeking a transfer will successfully secure a posting to their desired location. Furthermore, you will receive significant respect and honors within society. Students, however, must maintain strict concentration and dedication toward their duties this month. It is essential to learn to keep your emotions in check and avoid impulsive or excessive behavior.

During June 2026, your spouse may face health issues or a minor surgical procedure, leading to significant financial expenditure. It is essential that you pay close attention to your spouse's well-being. In your professional life, a supportive and encouraging atmosphere will prevail. Business ventures will be profitable, with particularly high gains indicated for those involved in the trade of textiles and perfumes (fragrances). This month is highly favorable for making decisions regarding your future life plans. It is also an auspicious period for those making efforts toward progeny. Individuals born under Mesha Rashi will receive timely assistance or benefits from newly formed acquaintances. In the final week—specifically after the 22nd—couples who have approached the court regarding marital disputes can expect a resolution. Efforts toward marriage for the unmarried will also bear fruit this month. Please note that the 5th, 6th, 8th, 19th, and 29th are unfavorable dates. Those born under the Bharani Nakshatra must exercise particular caution. For those born under Ashwini Nakshatra who possess an interest in the arts, this month is exceptionally favorable for beginning formal training in vocal music or musical instruments.

During July 2026, financial income will remain moderate. Women born under Mesha Rashi are cautioned that gynecological or pregnancy-related issues may cause some distress. Professional and business activities will proceed at a standard pace. It is not advisable to initiate new projects by delegating the primary responsibility to others; instead, ensure you complete your tasks through proper and direct channels. Mentally, you will feel highly enthusiastic and energetic. You will forge new relationships with relatives and successfully achieve a long-held ambition. Between the 11th and 16th, opportunities for new sources of income are likely to manifest. You will experience a joyful atmosphere in both your personal life/home and your workplace, as differences of opinion among family members subside. You will pursue your goals with determination, undeterred by obstacles. However, it is wise to avoid taking any impulsive or adventurous risks regarding your career. During this period, the influence of Elinati Shani (Sade Sati) will be intense, affecting your conduct and decision-making. Due to this unfavorable transit of Saturn, luck may not be on your side; therefore, it is best to focus on earning a reputation as a responsible and patient professional. Efforts regarding foreign residency or overseas employment will encounter several hurdles this month.

During August 2026, physical exertion related to domestic needs and various auspicious ceremonies (Shubha Karyas) will increase. Your responsibilities will grow, and you will likely arrange for new amenities or comforts within the home. Financial income will remain moderate. Students born under Mesha Rashi will see favorable results regarding their aspirations for education or life abroad. All types of business activities will continue at a standard pace. However, the third week of this month may not be very favorable for siblings (Bhathru varga). Those employed in the government sector can expect to receive some good news. In the final week of the month, the job search for the unemployed is likely to reach a successful conclusion. While general health matters will be satisfactory, you may encounter situations that lead to mental distress or anxiety on the 7th, 10th, 14th, and 25th. There are indications of unsettling conditions arising in your professional life during these specific dates, and your clarity of thought may diminish.

In September 2026, for those born under Mesha Rashi, there are indications of health issues arising this month due to irregular meal timings (Akala Bhojanam). Those who are particularly fond of food must exercise caution during this period. All tasks initiated this month will yield mixed results. Notably, the efforts of the unemployed will face significant fluctuations and hurdles. The unsettling professional conditions experienced in the previous month are likely to persist. Financial income this month will not meet your expectations. It is advisable to plan your finances carefully, keeping the potential decrease in income in mind. For those born under Krithika Nakshatra, investments in the stock market will not be favorable during this period. You may find it necessary to seek financial assistance from friends. Long-distance travels will not yield the desired results. It is better to conduct yourself in a manner that allows others to understand your feelings clearly. Due to a tendency to become easily provoked or agitated, you may distance good people from your life. Furthermore, you might waste your valuable time tending to the affairs of others. This month, paternal elders (Pitru Varga) may suffer from respiratory health issues.

In October 2026, the intensity of the problems you have been facing for the past two months will decrease. You will likely undertake long-distance travels with family members and friends. Your health will be fully supportive, and your mental enthusiasm will surpass even your physical energy. Although the first two weeks may present some minor professional setbacks, you will be able to spend joyful and celebratory time in the company of your family. This is a favorable period to acquire valuable items or important legal documents/deeds. While financial income will remain moderate, any lingering suspicions regarding friends will be cleared. New relationships will strengthen, and your affection for your family will grow. You will also develop a keen interest in world affairs and global developments. For couples facing difficulties with conception, the blessing of progeny (Santana Siddhi) will bring immense joy. Women born under Mesha Rashi will prove to be exemplary and ideal mothers. Between the 25th and 29th of this month, you will encounter new opportunities in your professional life.
favorableDates: 25th and 29th of this month, you will encounter new

monthlyHighlights.summary: November 2026 will be favorable for those making efforts toward overseas employment or permanent foreign residency. While financial income will remain moderate, family-related expenses will begin to decrease. You will establish new acquaintances with influential societal leaders or high-ranking officials. In your professional life, completing tasks on time will help you earn significant recognition. During the second week, children in the family may face minor health irritations. Additionally, comfort or happiness related to the mother (Matru Soukhyam) may be somewhat diminished. For those in the business sector, income will not meet expectations during the initial weeks; however, earnings will improve toward the end of the month. You must not forget that others may not trust you with the same sincerity that you place in them. Please note that the 8th, 13th, 15th, and 22nd are not favorable dates. It is advisable to postpone important matters or decisions during these specific days.

December 2026, you will be blessed with excellent financial gains. Promotions in professional life can be expected. Efforts to purchase a new house or open plots will be successful. For businesspeople, past disputes related to sales and transactions will be resolved, and you may receive favorable judgments in legal matters. Travels during this period will prove to be fruitful. While efforts toward progeny may cause some dissatisfaction during the first two weeks, previously severed friendships are likely to be renewed this month. This is an auspicious time to make marriage proposals or to meet family elders regarding inheritance matters. People from all walks of life will experience the financial gains they anticipated. Physical fitness and stamina will improve. Notably, a strong Dhana Yogam (financial prosperity) is indicated after December 17th. You will receive significant honor and respect. This is an exceptionally favorable time for students, and luck will favor matters related to male children. Furthermore, this month is a highly opportune time for those seeking to earn wealth in Gulf countries.

During January 2027, you will find yourself undertaking frequent travels. Due to high work pressure, you may experience some mental restlessness or lack of peace. You might need to utilize political influence or high-level networking to succeed in your efforts regarding long-distance transfers or relocations. Despite these pressures, you will be able to complete your goals effectively. You will also receive affection and support from someone you admire. Financial income is expected to increase during this period. Your talents will receive the recognition and status they deserve. However, those in the medical profession may face slight dissatisfaction regarding their earnings. A problem concerning your friends will be resolved through your skillful management and diplomacy. You may find yourself spending money on luxury items or comforts. In the final week of the month—specifically on the 24th, 25th, 26th, and 27th—it is advisable to be extra cautious and diligent in your professional life to avoid complications.

February 2027 will bring an excellent start to married life for the unmarried. For those seeking employment, this period will grant a job of high reputation and status. This is also an opportune month to make efforts toward a career change. Financial income will be strong, and you will be able to successfully complete all tasks you initiate. It is an ideal time to brainstorm and implement new ideas to improve your standard of living. Investments in new business ventures will prove profitable. Notably, those born under Bharani Nakshatra will experience unexpected financial gains (Aprayatna Dhana Labham) this month. Speculative ventures (such as the stock market) will also yield profits. By respecting the feelings and opinions of others, you will find personal life much more rewarding. Overall, this month of February will be highly favorable for individuals born under Mesha Rashi.

During March 2027, you will experience mixed results. While financial aspects remain favorable, you may encounter challenges regarding your health. This is not a particularly auspicious period for matters related to children (Santana). There are indications that the behavior of family members may cause some distress, and your personal health might also become a source of concern. On a positive note, your financial income will be strong this month. However, be cautious during the second week, as domestic situations may deviate significantly from the norm. In your professional life, exercise care when interacting with colleagues, as there are signs of potential unnecessary arguments or disputes. Favorable conditions will manifest for those looking to purchase new jewelry or a vehicle. Additionally, the third week serves as an opportune time for job changes or attending interviews.

notes: OCR used page 1 of the local PDF capture.
Match status is based on heading, available metrics, available annual section markers, and first month marker.
